transcription.text: They say as a boy, Mr. Clean really looked up to his grandmother, who was stronger than people twice her size. And that strength inspired his incredibly powerful liquid muscle. It's got two and a half times more power in every drop to lift tough dirt with less scrubbing, no matter where you use it. And with its auto-stop nozzle, almost nothing's wasted. Yep, sure made Grandma proud. Mr. Clean Liquid Muscle, proving when it comes to clean, there's only one mister.

segments.text: They say as a boy, Mr. Clean really looked up to his grandmother, who was stronger than people twice her size.
And that strength inspired his incredibly powerful liquid muscle.
It's got two and a half times more power in every drop to lift tough dirt with less scrubbing, no matter where you use it.
And with its auto-stop nozzle, almost nothing's wasted.
Mr. Clean Liquid Muscle, proving when it comes to clean, there's only one mister.
